text:
In this chapter, “navigation district” means a navigation district included in:

(1) Subchapters C, D, E, F, G, and H, Chapter 60 (Navigation Districts--general Provisions) , Water Code;

(2) Subchapter E, Chapter 61 (Article Iii, Section 52, Navigation Districts) , Water Code; or

(3) Sections 62.154 through 62.159 (Conflicts with Prior Bonds or Other Laws) , Water Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 62. Navigation Dist. Pilot Boards
##### § 62.001 — Definition

In this chapter, “navigation district” means a navigation district included in:

    (1) Subchapters C, D, E, F, G, and H, Chapter 60 (Navigation Districts--general Provisions) , Water Code;

    (2) Subchapter E, Chapter 61 (Article Iii, Section 52, Navigation Districts) , Water Code; or

    (3) Sections 62.154 through 62.159 (Conflicts with Prior Bonds or Other Laws) , Water Code.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
